title: Wall Mop Cleaner Long Handle 202 cm, 180° Folding Ceiling Washer Scrubber and Squeegee, Triangle Baseboard Cleaning Tool Duster with 6 Microfiber Chenille Pads for Painted Walls Window Floor
features: 180° Folding Wall Cleaning mop: Dolanx wall cleaner mop folds bidirectionally for efficient cleaning. Up fold fits baseboard, wall and ceiling corners. Down fold simplifies cleaning of fans, bay windows, cabinets and door frames

Long Handle Wall Cleaner Adjustable Length: The wall scrubber can be adjusted from 91 cm to 202 cm. This feature ensures safety by eliminating the need for ladders, allowing you to comfortably and effortlessly clean high windows or walls

6 Replacement Triangle Mop Pads: The wall duster comes with 3 chenille pads and 3 microfiber pads. The microfiber pads facilitate wet cleaning for mopping and window washing, whereas the chenille pads are ideal for dry dusting and removing spider webs

360° rotating adjustable cleaning mop: The baseboard mop's 360-degree swivel head helps get around bulky and heavy furniture without lifting it laboriously. It can effectively clean the dust under the bed, sofa, table or other hard-to-reach spots

Integrated Squeegee Bar: This wall brush for cleaning features with a silicone squeegee for efficient removal of dirt, dust, particles, and soapy residue from shower doors, windows, floors, and glass surfaces
